title: EZClaims
description: A lightweight land-claiming plugin for survival/SMP servers that lets players quickly protect their builds while giving admins full control through flexible settings.
body:
EZClaims — Simple, Fast, and Reliable Land Protection

EZClaims is a lightweight and performance-friendly Paper plugin designed to make land claiming easy for players and server owners. It focuses on speed, simplicity, and clarity, giving servers an effective protection system without the bloat of larger claim plugins.

What EZClaims Adds

A complete land-claiming system for protecting player builds

Intuitive tools for creating, resizing, and managing claims

Straightforward commands that are easy for new players to learn

Automatic protection against griefing within claimed areas

Minimal configuration so you can set it up and start using it quickly

Why Use EZClaims?

EZClaims is perfect for servers that want reliable claim protection without overwhelming menus, complex flags, or heavy dependencies. It’s built to be lightweight and easy for players to understand while still giving server owners control and consistency.

If you want a clean, no-nonsense claiming system that “just works,” EZClaims is a great fit.
